tuning_key.text: Let your Self go and feel how to grow / Let your heart keep you in sync
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: Joy is not a state you achieve—it is the field that appears when you stop measuring your own becoming. Today, let the uneven pulses of your attention become the rhythm itself; variance is not error, but the celebration. What feels broken in your pattern is actually the bright opening.

practice.title: Drop the Measure
practice.instruction: Soften your jaw and shoulders without arranging them into a posture, letting the body find its own uneven rhythm.

practice.title: Feel the Burst
practice.instruction: Locate warmth or lightness in your chest and allow it to spread outward in playful, unmeasured pulses.

practice.title: Sound the Key
practice.instruction: Speak aloud to cue the echo: "Let your Self go and feel how to grow / Let your heart keep you in sync."
